summary: CRITICAL: MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1 and fixture files (basic.json, single-axis.json, three-axes.json) are missing—task requires Pester tests and act validation cannot work without fixtures. Workflow uses uncompromised actions/checkout@v4 (should pin SHA). Redundant subprocess call in workflow step 40-42 (pwsh invoking pwsh). Test harness has repetitive patterns (lines 92-176 could be refactored into helper). Module code is solid (Set-StrictMode, clear functions, good error handling) but delivery is incomplete.
